# `it-security` — it-security templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 6

Phishing templates impersonating internal IT department communications

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

|---|---|---|---|---|

## Template details

### Email Server Migration Notice

- **File:** [`email_issues.html`](email_issues.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 55-75%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/it_security_education.html`](education/it_security_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - IT: Email server migration — account verification required
  - Action Required: Verify your email account after migration
  - IT Department: Your email may be affected by last night's maintenance
- **Operator notes:** High-yield IT lure exploiting trust in the help desk; the post-migration verification pretext is broadly believable. Time it away from any genuine maintenance windows so it doesn't collide with real IT comms.

### Email Mailbox Size Limit

- **File:** [`email_size_limit.html`](email_size_limit.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 50-70%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/it_security_education.html`](education/it_security_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your mailbox is almost full — action required
  - IT: Email storage limit reached for your account
  - Warning: Your email account is at 95% capacity
- **Operator notes:** Classic, high-converting IT lure — the full-mailbox warning is familiar and creates mild urgency to act. Works well as an early baseline. Keep the storage figures plausible for your mail platform.

### Mailbox Compromised Alert

- **File:** [`mailbox_compromised.html`](mailbox_compromised.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/it_security_education.html`](education/it_security_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Security Alert: Unusual activity detected on your email account
  - IT Security: Your mailbox may have been compromised
  - Urgent: Suspicious sign-in activity on {{.Email}}
- **Operator notes:** Security-alert lure that weaponizes fear of a breach. The {{.Email}} personalization in the subject sharply increases credibility and clicks. Reserve it for programs with immediate just-in-time training, as it can provoke anxiety.

### Mandatory System Update

- **File:** [`system_update.html`](system_update.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/it_security_education.html`](education/it_security_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - IT: Mandatory system update required by end of business
  - Action Required: Install critical security patch
  - Your computer requires an immediate software update
- **Operator notes:** Routine-IT lure leveraging compliance with mandatory updates; the end-of-day deadline adds light pressure. Broadly effective — tailor the patch/software name to tools your organization deploys.

### Webmail Upgrade Required

- **File:** [`webmail_upgrade.html`](webmail_upgrade.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 50-70%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/it_security_education.html`](education/it_security_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - IT: Webmail upgrade requires your action
  - Your webmail client is being upgraded — verify your account
  - Action required: Complete your email upgrade by Friday
- **Operator notes:** High-yield IT lure — webmail upgrades are common and low-suspicion, and the deadline framing motivates action. Best for organizations using browser-based mail; adjust the wording for desktop-client shops.

### Dropbox File Share (IT Variant)

- **File:** [`dropbox_share.html`](dropbox_share.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/it_security_education.html`](education/it_security_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - IT has shared a document with you via Dropbox
  - Shared: IT Security Policy Update 2024.pdf
  - You have a new file share from IT
- **Operator notes:** IT-branded variant of the Dropbox share lure — the internal-IT sender adds authority and lifts click rates over the generic version. Good for testing trust in internal-IT communications. Match the shared filename to a plausible policy document.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
